entity.label: Hazar-susah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Village of the horse, the same as Sansannah, one of Solomon’s “chariot cities” (Josh. 15:31; 2 Chr. 1:14), a depot in the south border of Judah.

nodes.label: Hazar-susah
nodes.description: Village of the horse, the same as Sansannah, one of Solomon’s “chariot cities” (Josh. 15:31; 2 Chr. 1:14), a depot in the south border of Judah.

verses.text: And Ziklag, and Bethmarcaboth, and Hazarsusah,
